issues.description: TrashFromHand trashes from hand, but card text says 'from the top of your deck'. Should be ForceDiscard with source 'deck' or a mill/trash-from-deck action. TrashFromHand is incorrect.

suggestedDsl.effectText:
[On Play] Trash 3 cards from the top of your deck.
[On K.O.] Draw 1 card.
